zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Maxwell於1410年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，她的父親Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell23歲，母親Janet Herries20歲。她於大約1424年與Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1484年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努享年74歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine Maxwell于1410年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾时，她的父亲Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell23岁，母亲Janet Herries20岁。她于大约1424年与Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1484年在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登努享年74岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Maxwell was born in 1410, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell, was 23 and her mother, Janet Herries, was 20. She married Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy about 1424, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1484, in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Maxwell est née en 1410, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Janet Herries, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy environ 1424, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1484, à Dunure, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Maxwell 1410 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell 23 und ihre Mutter Janet Herries 20. Sie hat um 1424 in Schottland, United Kingdom Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1484 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Dunure, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy circa 1424, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Maxwellが1410年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで生まれた時，父Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwellは23歳，母Janet Herriesは20歳であった。約1424年にイギリススコットランドでGilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1484年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダヌアで74歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Maxwell(이)가 1410년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Herries(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1424년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던르에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Maxwell nasceu em 1410, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Janet Herries, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy aproximadamente 1424, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1484, em Dunure, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Maxwell родилась в 1410 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Herries, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy около 1424 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1484 г. в местности дунур, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catherine Maxwell nació en 1410, en Maybole, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Herbert Maxwell First Lord Maxwell, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Janet Herries, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy aproximadamente 1424, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1484, en Dunure, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Escocia, Reino Unido.
